name: cursor-usage-viz
description: A local-first Bloomberg-Terminal-style desktop app (Electron + SQLite) for Cursor usage. Drop in a usage-events-*.csv exported from cursor.com/dashboard/usage and get model breakdowns, a Day Audit narrative, anomaly detection, forecast bands, and a Year-in-review — all computed locally, no telemetry.

scripts.release:smoke: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm --filter @cu/playground build && pnpm bundle:report
